# sdlc-platform

> Open-source privacy gateway that scrubs PII and secrets out of every prompt before it reaches an LLM. Self-hosted Go backend with browser extensions for ChatGPT / Claude / Gemini / Copilot, IDE addins for VS Code / JetBrains / Cursor, and Office addins for Word / Outlook. Five DLP presets (pii_default, secrets, legal, finance, healthcare), HMAC-chained audit log, RBAC, SCIM 2.0, SAML 2.0, per-tenant spend caps, and multi-provider routing across Anthropic, OpenAI, Bedrock, Vertex, Azure, and self-hosted models.

sdlc-platform is licensed under AGPL-3.0-or-later for self-host use, with a tiered commercial license (Team $39/seat/mo, Business $79/seat/mo, Enterprise from $4,000/seat/yr) that lifts the AGPL source-disclosure obligation for closed-source embedders. Bundled under one Trust Center and one MSA with two sibling products: AMLIQ (AML compliance dashboard) and OpenSyber/Claw (multi-provider AI gateway). Built for privacy- and compliance-bound teams: legal (one DLP preset cites ABA Model Rule 1.6 + Heppner SDNY 2026-02-17), financial-services (IBAN/BIC/Israeli-ID patterns, FINRA-adjacent), healthcare (ICD-10/NPI/DEA/PHI patterns, HIPAA-aligned), and any team using consumer LLM web UIs at work who needs to keep PII and secrets out of vendor prompts.

## Docs

- [Documentation home](https://sdlc.cc/docs): Architecture overview, deployment guides, and configuration reference.
- [Quick start: self-host in 15 minutes](https://sdlc.cc/docs/quickstart): docker-compose deployment, first tenant, first DLP policy.
- [DLP presets](https://sdlc.cc/docs/dlp): How the five presets (pii_default, secrets, legal, finance, healthcare) work, opt-in per tenant, custom Rego patterns.
- [Browser extension](https://sdlc.cc/docs/browser-extension): Manifest V3 extension that intercepts ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini/Copilot before submit.
- [VS Code addin](https://sdlc.cc/docs/vscode-addin): "Scrub selection" + "Scrub clipboard" commands. JetBrains + Cursor on roadmap.
- [Audit log](https://sdlc.cc/docs/audit-log): Tamper-evident HMAC-chained log of every prompt, completion, retrieval, and DLP decision. Replay-with-redaction supported.
- [RBAC, SCIM, SAML](https://sdlc.cc/docs/identity): Map Okta / Azure AD / Google groups to tenant scopes. OPA Rego policy evaluation.
- [Multi-provider routing](https://sdlc.cc/docs/providers): Failover + spend-capped routing across Anthropic, OpenAI, Bedrock, Vertex, Azure, vLLM, Ollama.
- [API reference](https://sdlc.cc/docs/api): `POST /v1/redact` standalone scan endpoint used by the extension surfaces.

## Pricing

- [Pricing page](https://sdlc.cc/pricing): Free (self-host AGPL) / Team $39/seat/mo / Business $79/seat/mo / Enterprise from $4,000/seat/yr.
- [Commercial license](https://sdlc.cc/commercial): Buy a tier, request enterprise terms, or arrange a managed deployment.
- [Trust Center](https://trust.sdlc.cc/): Cross-product Trust posture for sdlc-platform + AMLIQ + Claw. Security overview, sub-processors, DPA/MSA, audit-log architecture, SOC 2 status.

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/finsavvyai/sdlc-platform): Full source under AGPL-3.0-or-later, including the Go gateway, Python RAG service, browser extension, VS Code addin, DLP presets, and OPA policy bundles.

## Optional

- [Blog](https://sdlc.cc/blog): Engineering notes, market commentary (Lakera→Cisco, EU AI Act, Anthropic FSI push), release announcements.
- [Privacy](https://sdlc.cc/privacy): How sdlc.cc handles marketing-site visitor data. The self-hosted product processes zero data on our infrastructure.
